34	> 🔧 **[Agent Skills](https://github.com/specstoryai/agent-skills)** - Install skills to generate session summaries, fetch project stats, organize history, and more
35	
36	## How It Works
37	```
38	AI Coding Tools              Local First                  Cloud Platform
39	─────────────────           ─────────────                ─────────────────
40	                                                          (Login Required)
41	Cursor IDE         ┐
42	Copilot IDE        │
43	Claude Code CLI    │
44	Cursor CLI         ├──────►  .specstory/history/  ──────►  cloud.specstory.com
45	Codex CLI          │          (Auto-Saved Locally)        (Search, Ask & Share)
46	Droid CLI          │
47	Gemini CLI         ┘
48	```
49	
50	## Workflow
51	
52	1. **Capture** - Extensions save every AI interaction locally to `.specstory/history/`
53	2. **Process** - Use [Agent Skills](https://github.com/specstoryai/agent-skills) to generate summaries, stats, and insights from your history
54	3. **Sync (Optional)** - Only if logged in, sessions sync to cloud
55	4. **Search** - Find conversations locally or across all projects in cloud
56	5. **Share** - Export and share specific solutions with your team
57	
58	## Supported Development Tools
59	
60	SpecStory integrates seamlessly with your favorite AI coding tools, automatically saving all conversations locally to `.specstory/history/` in your project. **Everything is local-first** - your data stays on your machine unless you choose to sync to the cloud.
61	
62	### Installation
63	
64	| Product                                                          | Type | Source                                                                                              | Supported Agent                                                               | Min Version  | Installation                                                  | Changelog                                                                                  |
65	|------------------------------------------------------------------|------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
66	| **[Cursor Extension](https://www.cursor.com/)**                  | IDE  | Closed                                                                                              | [Cursor AI](https://www.cursor.com/)                                          | v0.43.6+     | Search "SpecStory" in Extensions (Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+X) → Install | [📋 View](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items/SpecStory.specstory-vscode/changelog) |
67	| **[VSC Copilot Extension](https://github.com/features/copilot)** | IDE  | Closed                                                                                              | [GitHub Copilot](https://github.com/features/copilot)                         | v1.300.0+    | Search "SpecStory" in Extensions (Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+X) → Install | [📋 View](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items/SpecStory.specstory-vscode/changelog) |
68	| **[SpecStory CLI](https://specstory.com/specstory-cli)**         | CLI  | [Open](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/tree/dev/specstory-cli/pkg/providers/claudecode) | [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code)                                  | v1.0.27+     | `brew tap specstoryai/tap`<br/>`brew install specstory`       | [📋 View](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/releases)                            |
69	| **[SpecStory CLI](https://specstory.com/specstory-cli)**         | CLI  | [Open](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/tree/dev/specstory-cli/pkg/providers/codexcli)   | [Codex CLI](https://www.openai.com/codex)                                     | v0.42.0+     | `brew tap specstoryai/tap`<br/>`brew install specstory`       | [📋 View](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/releases)                            |
70	| **[SpecStory CLI](https://specstory.com/specstory-cli)**         | CLI  | [Open](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/tree/dev/specstory-cli/pkg/providers/cursorcli)  | [Cursor CLI](https://cursor.com/cli)                                          | v2025.09.18+ | `brew tap specstoryai/tap`<br/>`brew install specstory`       | [📋 View](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/releases)                            |
71	| **[SpecStory CLI](https://specstory.com/specstory-cli)**         | CLI  | [Open](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/tree/dev/specstory-cli/pkg/providers/droidcli)   | [Droid CLI](https://factory.ai/product/cli)                                   | v0.56.3+     | `brew tap specstoryai/tap`<br/>`brew install specstory`       | [📋 View](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/releases)                            |
72	| **[SpecStory CLI](https://specstory.com/specstory-cli)**         | CLI  | [Open](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/tree/dev/specstory-cli/pkg/providers/geminicli)  | [Gemini CLI](https://docs.cloud.google.com/gemini/docs/codeassist/gemini-cli) | 0.15.1+      | `brew tap specstoryai/tap`<br/>`brew install specstory`       | [📋 View](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/releases)                            |
73	
74	> [!NOTE]
75	> For Cursor users: Install from within Cursor, not from the Visual Studio Marketplace website. [Learn why](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/issues/8)
76	
77	### CLI Tools
78	
79	**One installation works with all CLI tools** - Claude Code, Cursor CLI, and Codex:
80	
81	```bash
82	# Check which agents are installed
83	specstory check
84	
85	# Launch your preferred agent with auto-save
86	specstory run claude    # Launch Claude Code
87	specstory run cursor    # Launch Cursor CLI
88	specstory run codex     # Launch Codex CLI
89	specstory run droid     # Launch Droid CLI
90	specstory run gemini    # Launch Gemini CLI
91	specstory run           # Launch default agent
92	```
93	
94	All sessions automatically save to `.specstory/history/` in your current project.
95	
96	> [!TIP]
97	> The SpecStory CLI acts as a wrapper that enhances any of these terminal agents with automatic session saving. You only need the respective agent installed (e.g., Claude Code) for SpecStory to work with it.
98	
99	## SpecStory Cloud ☁️
100	
101	[**SpecStory Cloud**](https://cloud.specstory.com) transforms your local AI conversations into a powerful, centralized knowledge system.
102	
103	### The Problem We Solve
104	- **Lost Context**: Critical decisions and solutions scattered across machines and projects
105	- **No Global Search**: Finding that perfect solution from last month is impossible
106	- **Fragile Sharing**: Passing around Markdown files doesn't scale
107	
108	### The Solution
109	SpecStory Cloud creates your personal AI coding knowledge base:
110	- 🔍 **Search Everywhere**: Full-text search across all your projects via web interface. RAG coming soon.
111	- 🎯 **Explicit Opt-In**: Nothing syncs to cloud without sign-up and login first
112	- 📚 **Organized by Project**: Automatic categorization by repository and time
113	- 🚀 **API Access**: Programmatic sync and search for automation
114	- 👥 **Team Features**: Coming soon - share knowledge across your organization
115	
116	[Get Started with SpecStory Cloud →](https://cloud.specstory.com)
117	
118	### How to Sync to Cloud
119	
120	| Method | One-Time Setup | Live Sessions | Past Sessions |
121	|--------|----------------|---------------|---------------|
122	| **SpecStory CLI** | `specstory login` | Auto-pushed when using `specstory run` while logged in | Use `specstory sync` to push existing local sessions |
123	| **Cursor Extension** | Command Palette → "SpecStory: Open Cloud Sync Configuration" | Configure auto-sync in settings | Use sync command from Command Palette |
124	| **VSCode Extension** | Command Palette → "SpecStory: Open Cloud Sync Configuration" | Configure auto-sync in settings | Use sync command from Command Palette |
125	
126	> [!IMPORTANT]
127	> **Local-First & Private by Default**: All sessions are saved locally to `.specstory/history/`. Nothing is ever sent to the cloud unless you explicitly login with. Even after logging in, you can control what gets synced.
128	
129	## Documentation & Support
130	
131	- 📚 **[Full Documentation](https://docs.specstory.com/overview)** - Complete guides and [Cloud API reference](https://docs.specstory.com/api-reference/introduction)
132	- 🔧 **[Agent Skills](https://github.com/specstoryai/agent-skills)** - Generate summaries, stats, and insights from your `.specstory/history`
133	- 🐛 **[Report Issues](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/issues)** - We actively monitor and respond
134	- 📖 **[Contribute to Docs](https://github.com/specstoryai/docs/)** - PRs welcome!
135	
136	## Reviews & Feedback
137	
138	Love SpecStory? Help others discover their AI coding memory upgrade by leaving a [review](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=SpecStory.specstory-vscode&ssr=false#review-details)! 🧠
139	
140	## Star History

 `./changelog.md`

```text
1	# Specstory CLI Changelog
2	
3	## v1.13.0 2026-05-18
4	
5	### 📢 Announcements
6	
7	- The SpecStory CLI now supports [DeepSeek TUI](https://github.com/Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI) (i.e. `deepseek-tui`) for sessions created from DeepSeek TUI version `0.8.39` or higher. Sessions from earlier versions may work, but are not officially supported. This provides the same support for saving to local markdown files and to the SpecStory Cloud as for [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/docs/api/claude-code), [Cursor CLI](https://cursor.com/docs/cli), [Codex CLI](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli/), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli) and Factory's [Droid CLI](https://factory.ai/product/cli). Thank you to [KiBlazer](https://github.com/KiBlazer) for the [contribution](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/pull/218).
8	
9	## v1.12.0 2026-03-19
10	
11	### ⚙️ Improvements
12	
13	- Improve markdown file naming accuracy for the Claude Code provider by filtering additional system-injected messages from slug generation.
14	- Ensure all markdown file names are lower case for consistency.
15	- Better efficiency by the Factory Droid CLI provider during `specstory watch` and `specstory watch droid` commands.
16	
17	## v1.11.0 2026-03-02
18	
19	### 📢 Announcements
20	
21	- `specstory sync` now generates session statistics at `./.specstory/statistics.json`. This data is available for custom tooling or analysis, or you can safely ignore it.
22	
23	### 🔧 CLI Configuration & Commands
24	
25	- `specstory sync` now supports an `--only-stats` flag that skips the full local and/or cloud sync and only generates or updates `./.specstory/statistics.json`.
26	
27	### ⚙️ Improvements
28	
29	- Update project directory handling for the Gemini CLI provider. Gemini CLI `v0.30.0+` changed how it names project directories under `~/.gemini/tmp/`. Previously it used a SHA256 hash of the project's absolute path (e.g., `c18385f0...`). Now it uses the project folder's basename and stores the actual project path in a `.project_root` file inside that directory. [Issue #183](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/issues/183)
30	- Use file system events rather than polling in Gemini CLI provider to avoid noisy logging activity (every 30s) during `specstory watch`.
31	
32	### 🐛 Bug Fixes
33	
34	- Ensure Claude Code provider doesn't use session summary self-message as first user message when creating markdown file slug. [Contribution](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/pull/178) from @salmonumbrella.
35	
36	
37	## v1.10.0 2026-02-23
38	
39	### 📢 Announcements
40
```
